title: streblus elongatus
intro: Streblus elongatus, also known as the Coriandrum or Tonga Bread Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Streblus elongatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from fever and other respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used as a topical application for its medicinal benefits.
